meta.title: 小学生必背古诗
meta.subtitle: Classical Chinese Poems for Primary School

fields.poem: id, title, titlePinyin, titleEn, author, dynasty, grade, volume, lines[], chars[], notes{}
fields.line: text, pinyin, zh (白话译文), en (translation)
fields.char: char, pinyin, zh (字义), en (gloss); deduplicated within a poem, 多音字 noted in zh
fields.notes: background / culture / rhetoric, each { zh, en }
fields.sandhi: 连读变调 (tone sandhi) list: [{ text, rule, base, read, value, markChange, where, zh, en }]. rule ∈ 上上变调 / 半上声 / 半去声 / 一字变调 / 不字变调. base = 本调 pinyin, read = 实际读音 pinyin, value = 实际调值 (35/211/53/51). markChange=true when the pinyin tone mark itself changes (上上变调/一/不); markChange=false for 调值-only refinements (半上声 211, 半去声 53) where spelling is unchanged. Computed over each line and the title as separate prosodic units (a unit-final 上声/去声 keeps its full citation tone). 半去声 only applies within a 2-syllable foot, never across the caesura/foot boundary. 'where' is the containing line, or 题目 for the title. Empty array = 全诗按本调朗读.
fields.tags: theme tags: array of category keys (multi-label, central themes only). Definitions in poems/categories.json.

lines.pinyin: bái rì yī shān jìn
lines.zh: 夕阳依傍着群山缓缓落下。
lines.en: The bright sun sets behind the mountains,

lines.pinyin: huáng hé rù hǎi liú
lines.zh: 黄河奔腾着流入大海。
lines.en: the Yellow River flows on into the sea.

lines.pinyin: yù qióng qiān lǐ mù
lines.zh: 想要看到千里之外的景色，
lines.en: If you wish to see a thousand miles,

lines.pinyin: gèng shàng yī céng lóu
lines.zh: 就要再登上更高的一层楼。
lines.en: climb one more flight of the tower.

chars.zh: 再，又（多音字：gēng 更换、夜里时段）。

background.zh: 王之涣登上山西蒲州的鹳雀楼，远眺黄河落日时写下此诗。
background.en: Wang Zhihuan wrote this poem while gazing at the Yellow River and the setting sun from Stork Tower in Shanxi.

culture.zh: “欲穷千里目，更上一层楼”成为激励人不断进取的千古名句。
culture.en: The lines about climbing higher to see farther have become a famous proverb urging people to keep striving.

rhetoric.zh: 前两句对偶写景，后两句以“千里”夸张极言望远之广，由景入理，蕴含登高望远的哲理。
rhetoric.en: The first couplet uses parallelism to describe the scene; the second exaggerates the view's reach with a thousand li before turning scenery into the lesson that a higher vantage gives a wider view.

sandhi.zh: "海"是上声，在非上声"流"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：hǎi。
sandhi.en: 海 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 流; the written pinyin stays hǎi.

sandhi.zh: "里"是上声，在非上声"目"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：lǐ。
sandhi.en: 里 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 目; the written pinyin stays lǐ.

sandhi.zh: "更"是去声，在去声"上"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：gèng。
sandhi.en: 更 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 上; the written pinyin stays gèng.

sandhi.zh: "一"在阴平/阳平/上声"层"前变读去声（第四声）：yī→yì。
sandhi.en: 一 before the (1st/2nd/3rd-tone) 层 changes to fourth tone: yī → yì.

lines.pinyin: rì zhào xiāng lú shēng zǐ yān
lines.zh: 阳光照在香炉峰上，升起紫色的云烟。
lines.en: Sunlight on Incense Burner Peak raises a purple haze,

lines.pinyin: yáo kàn pù bù guà qián chuān
lines.zh: 远远望去，瀑布像挂在山前的河流。
lines.en: from afar the waterfall hangs like a river before the cliff.

lines.pinyin: fēi liú zhí xià sān qiān chǐ
lines.zh: 水流飞泻而下，仿佛有三千尺高。
lines.en: The torrent plunges straight down three thousand feet,

lines.pinyin: yí shì yín hé luò jiǔ tiān
lines.zh: 让人怀疑是银河从九重天上落了下来。
lines.en: as if the Milky Way had tumbled from the highest heaven.

chars.zh: 瀑布的“布”，像布一样垂下。
天空，九天指天的最高处。

background.zh: 李白游览庐山，被香炉峰瀑布的壮丽景象震撼而作此诗。
background.en: Li Bai wrote this poem when awed by the magnificent waterfall on Incense Burner Peak during a visit to Mount Lu.

culture.zh: “飞流直下三千尺，疑是银河落九天”是描写瀑布的千古名句。
culture.en: The lines comparing the waterfall to the Milky Way falling from heaven are among the most celebrated descriptions of a cataract.

rhetoric.zh: 运用夸张和比喻，把瀑布比作天上落下的银河，气势磅礴。
rhetoric.en: Hyperbole and metaphor liken the waterfall to the Milky Way crashing down, creating a grand, sweeping effect.

sandhi.zh: "日"是去声，在去声"照"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：rì。
sandhi.en: 日 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 照; the written pinyin stays rì.

sandhi.zh: "紫"是上声，在非上声"烟"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：zǐ。
sandhi.en: 紫 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 烟; the written pinyin stays zǐ.

sandhi.zh: "瀑"是去声，在去声"布"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：pù。
sandhi.en: 瀑 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 布; the written pinyin stays pù.

sandhi.zh: "九"是上声，在非上声"天"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：jiǔ。
sandhi.en: 九 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 天; the written pinyin stays jiǔ.

poems.title: 夜宿山寺
poems.titleEn: Spending the Night at a Mountain Temple
poems.author: 李白

lines.pinyin: wēi lóu gāo bǎi chǐ
lines.zh: 山上的高楼有一百尺那么高。
lines.en: The lofty tower rises a hundred feet high,

lines.pinyin: shǒu kě zhāi xīng chén
lines.zh: 好像伸手就能摘到天上的星星。
lines.en: so high I could pluck the stars with my hand.

lines.pinyin: bù gǎn gāo shēng yǔ
lines.zh: 我不敢大声说话，
lines.en: I dare not speak aloud,

lines.pinyin: kǒng jīng tiān shàng rén
lines.zh: 怕惊动了天上的神仙。
lines.en: for fear of startling the people of heaven.

chars.zh: 住宿，过夜（多音字：xiǔ 一宿；xiù 星宿）。

background.zh: 李白夜里在山顶的寺院里留宿，仰望星空写下此诗。
background.en: Li Bai wrote this poem while lodging overnight at a mountaintop temple, gazing up at the stars.

culture.zh: 诗中“手可摘星辰”体现了李白浪漫飘逸的诗风。
culture.en: The image of plucking stars by hand reflects Li Bai's romantic, soaring poetic style.

rhetoric.zh: 用夸张手法极写楼高，借“恐惊天上人”衬托山寺的高耸入云。
rhetoric.en: Hyperbole stresses the tower's height, and the fear of disturbing heaven's dwellers underscores how the temple seems to touch the sky.

sandhi.zh: "夜"是去声，在去声"宿"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：yè。
sandhi.en: 夜 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 宿; the written pinyin stays yè.

sandhi.zh: "百"在上声"尺"前变读阳平（第二声）：bǎi→bái。
sandhi.en: 百 comes before the third-tone 尺, so it is read in second tone: bǎi → bái.

sandhi.zh: "手"在上声"可"前变读阳平（第二声）：shǒu→shóu。
sandhi.en: 手 comes before the third-tone 可, so it is read in second tone: shǒu → shóu.

sandhi.zh: "可"是上声，在非上声"摘"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：kě。
sandhi.en: 可 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 摘; the written pinyin stays kě.

sandhi.zh: "敢"是上声，在非上声"高"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：gǎn。
sandhi.en: 敢 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 高; the written pinyin stays gǎn.

sandhi.zh: "恐"是上声，在非上声"惊"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：kǒng。
sandhi.en: 恐 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 惊; the written pinyin stays kǒng.

lines.pinyin: chì lè chuān yīn shān xià
lines.zh: 敕勒族居住的大平原，就在阴山脚下。
lines.en: The Chilek plain lies at the foot of the Yin Mountains.

lines.pinyin: tiān sì qióng lú lǒng gài sì yě
lines.zh: 天空像一顶巨大的毡帐，笼罩着辽阔的原野。
lines.en: The sky is like a round felt tent, covering the wilds on every side.

lines.pinyin: tiān cāng cāng yě máng máng
lines.zh: 天空湛蓝辽阔，原野苍茫无边。
lines.en: The sky is deep blue, the wilds are vast and boundless,

lines.pinyin: fēng chuī cǎo dī xiàn niú yáng
lines.zh: 风吹过草地，草伏下去，露出了成群的牛羊。
lines.en: the wind bends the grass low, and herds of cattle and sheep appear.

chars.zh: 敕勒的“勒”（多音字：lēi 勒紧）。
像，好像（多音字：shì 似的）。
穹庐，像天空一样的圆顶。
毡帐，蒙古包似的圆顶帐篷。
笼罩，覆盖（多音字：lóng 笼子）。
同“现”，显现、露出（多音字：jiàn 看见）。

background.zh: 这是南北朝时期流传于北方草原的敕勒族民歌，由鲜卑语译为汉语。
background.en: This is a folk song of the Chilek people of the northern grasslands during the Northern Dynasties, translated into Chinese from Xianbei.

culture.zh: 诗歌展现了北方游牧民族辽阔的草原风光和豪迈的生活。
culture.en: The song depicts the broad grassland scenery and bold life of the northern nomadic peoples.

rhetoric.zh: 用比喻把天空比作穹庐，“天苍苍，野茫茫”以叠词对举铺展草原的辽阔，结尾以“风吹草低见牛羊”动态收束，意境开阔。
rhetoric.en: A metaphor compares the sky to a felt dome; the paired reduplication of boundless blue, boundless grey spreads the steppe wide, and the dynamic closing line of wind-bent grass revealing herds creates a vast, open mood.

sandhi.zh: "敕"是去声，在去声"勒"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：chì。
sandhi.en: 敕 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 勒; the written pinyin stays chì.

sandhi.zh: "敕"是去声，在去声"勒"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：chì。
sandhi.en: 敕 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 勒; the written pinyin stays chì.

sandhi.zh: "笼"是上声，在非上声"盖"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：lǒng。
sandhi.en: 笼 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 盖; the written pinyin stays lǒng.

sandhi.zh: "野"是上声，在非上声"茫"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：yě。
sandhi.en: 野 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 茫; the written pinyin stays yě.

sandhi.zh: "草"是上声，在非上声"低"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：cǎo。
sandhi.en: 草 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 低; the written pinyin stays cǎo.

lines.pinyin: qiáng jiǎo shù zhī méi
lines.zh: 墙角处有几枝梅花。
lines.en: In a corner of the wall, a few sprigs of plum,

lines.pinyin: líng hán dú zì kāi
lines.zh: 它们冒着严寒独自开放。
lines.en: braving the cold, they bloom alone.

lines.pinyin: yáo zhī bù shì xuě
lines.zh: 远远看去就知道那不是雪，
lines.en: From afar I know they are not snow,

lines.pinyin: wèi yǒu àn xiāng lái
lines.zh: 因为有淡淡的清香飘来。
lines.en: for a faint fragrance drifts this way.

chars.zh: 几，若干（多音字：shǔ 数数）。
暗香，淡淡的、隐隐的香气。

background.zh: 王安石是北宋政治家、文学家，此诗借墙角梅花抒发情怀。
background.en: Wang Anshi, a statesman and writer of the Northern Song, conveys his feelings through plum blossoms in a corner of the wall.

culture.zh: 梅花象征坚贞高洁、不畏严寒的品格，是中国传统的“岁寒”意象。
culture.en: Plum blossoms symbolize integrity and resilience against the cold, a classic Chinese emblem of the harsh-winter spirit.

rhetoric.zh: “凌寒独自开”以拟人写梅花傲然独立；以“遥知不是雪”设悬念，借暗香点明是梅，托物言志赞美高洁品格。
rhetoric.en: Braving the cold, it blooms alone personifies the plum's solitary defiance; the line denying it is snow sets up suspense, and the hidden fragrance reveals the plum, using the object to praise noble character.

sandhi.zh: "角"是上声，在非上声"数"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：jiǎo。
sandhi.en: 角 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 数; the written pinyin stays jiǎo.

sandhi.zh: "不"在去声"是"前变读阳平（第二声）：bù→bú。
sandhi.en: 不 before the fourth-tone 是 changes to second tone: bù → bú.

sandhi.zh: "有"是上声，在非上声"暗"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：yǒu。
sandhi.en: 有 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 暗; the written pinyin stays yǒu.

lines.pinyin: péng tóu zhì zǐ xué chuí lún
lines.zh: 一个头发蓬乱的小孩子在学钓鱼。
lines.en: A tousle-haired little child is learning to fish,

lines.pinyin: cè zuò méi tái cǎo yìng shēn
lines.zh: 他侧身坐在长满青苔的地方，野草遮映着身子。
lines.en: sitting sideways on the mossy bank, grass half-hiding him.

lines.pinyin: lù rén jiè wèn yáo zhāo shǒu
lines.zh: 有过路人远远地向他问路，他连忙招手示意。
lines.en: When a passer-by calls out to ask the way, he waves from afar,

lines.pinyin: pà dé yú jīng bù yìng rén
lines.zh: 因为怕惊动了鱼，不敢出声答应。
lines.en: afraid of startling the fish, he will not answer aloud.

chars.zh: 钓鱼用的丝线（多音字：guān 纶巾）。
怕得，恐怕（多音字：de 跑得快；děi 必须）。
答应，回应（多音字：yīng 应当）。

background.zh: 胡令能是中唐诗人，此诗生动刻画了乡村小儿学钓鱼的情景。
background.en: Hu Lingneng, a mid-Tang poet, vividly portrays a rural child learning to fish.

culture.zh: 诗以白描手法表现孩童的天真专注，富有浓郁的生活情趣。
culture.en: The poem uses plain description to capture a child's innocence and focus, full of everyday charm.

rhetoric.zh: 通过“遥招手”“不应人”的动作和心理细节，传神地刻画出小儿专注钓鱼的形象。
rhetoric.en: Details of waving from afar and refusing to answer vividly render the boy's absorbed concentration on his fishing.

sandhi.zh: "小"是上声，在非上声"儿"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：xiǎo。
sandhi.en: 小 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 儿; the written pinyin stays xiǎo.

sandhi.zh: "子"是上声，在非上声"学"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：zǐ。
sandhi.en: 子 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 学; the written pinyin stays zǐ.

sandhi.zh: "侧"是去声，在去声"坐"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：cè。
sandhi.en: 侧 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 坐; the written pinyin stays cè.

sandhi.zh: "草"是上声，在非上声"映"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：cǎo。
sandhi.en: 草 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 映; the written pinyin stays cǎo.

sandhi.zh: "借"是去声，在去声"问"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：jiè。
sandhi.en: 借 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 问; the written pinyin stays jiè.

sandhi.zh: "不"在去声"应"前变读阳平（第二声）：bù→bú。
sandhi.en: 不 before the fourth-tone 应 changes to second tone: bù → bú.

lines.pinyin: qiān shān niǎo fēi jué
lines.zh: 群山之中，飞鸟的踪影全都不见了。
lines.en: Over a thousand hills, no birds in flight,

lines.pinyin: wàn jìng rén zōng miè
lines.zh: 所有的小路上，人的足迹也都消失了。
lines.en: on ten thousand paths, no human trace.

lines.pinyin: gū zhōu suō lì wēng
lines.zh: 一叶孤舟上，有个披着蓑衣、戴着斗笠的老翁。
lines.en: A lone boat, an old man in straw cape and hat,

lines.pinyin: dú diào hán jiāng xuě
lines.zh: 他独自在寒冷的江面上，冒着大雪垂钓。
lines.en: fishing alone in the cold river snow.

background.zh: 柳宗元被贬永州时所作，借寒江独钓抒发孤高愤懑之情。
background.en: Liu Zongyuan wrote this while exiled to Yongzhou, expressing lonely, proud indignation through the image of fishing alone in the snow.

culture.zh: “孤舟蓑笠翁，独钓寒江雪”塑造了清高孤傲的隐者形象，意境深远。
culture.en: The solitary fisherman in straw cape became a celebrated image of an aloof, lofty recluse.

rhetoric.zh: 前两句以“千山”“万径”夸张渲染极静空寂之景，对偶工整，与后两句孤舟独钓形成对比，烘托孤独。
rhetoric.en: The parallel opening couplet exaggerates with a thousand hills and ten thousand paths to paint utter stillness, contrasting with the lone fisherman to heighten the sense of solitude.

sandhi.zh: "鸟"是上声，在非上声"飞"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：niǎo。
sandhi.en: 鸟 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 飞; the written pinyin stays niǎo.

sandhi.zh: "万"是去声，在去声"径"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：wàn。
sandhi.en: 万 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 径; the written pinyin stays wàn.

lines.pinyin: cǎo zhǎng yīng fēi èr yuè tiān
lines.zh: 农历二月，青草渐渐发芽生长，黄莺飞来飞去。
lines.en: In the second month, grass grows tall and orioles fly about,

lines.pinyin: fú dī yáng liǔ zuì chūn yān
lines.zh: 轻拂着堤岸的杨柳，仿佛沉醉在春日的烟雾之中。
lines.en: Willows brushing the bank seem drunk on the misty spring.

lines.pinyin: ér tóng sàn xué guī lái zǎo
lines.zh: 村里的孩子们放学回来得早，
lines.en: The children come home early from school,

lines.pinyin: máng chèn dōng fēng fàng zhǐ yuān
lines.zh: 急忙趁着东风把风筝放上天空。
lines.en: and hurry, while the east wind blows, to fly their kites.

chars.zh: 生长；多音字，又读 cháng（长短）。
散开；这里指放学；多音字，又读 sǎn（松散）。

background.zh: 清代诗人高鼎晚年隐居乡村时所作，描绘早春二月的田园风光。
background.en: Written by the Qing poet Gao Ding while living in seclusion in the countryside, depicting early spring.

culture.zh: 纸鸢即风筝，放风筝是中国春日民间的传统活动。
culture.en: The paper kite (zhiyuan) reflects the traditional Chinese custom of flying kites in spring.

rhetoric.zh: 前两句写景，后两句写人，动静结合；“醉”字拟人，写出杨柳的迷人神态。
rhetoric.en: Scenery then people; the personifying word zui (drunk) gives the willows a charming air.

sandhi.zh: "草"在上声"长"前变读阳平（第二声）：cǎo→cáo。
sandhi.en: 草 comes before the third-tone 长, so it is read in second tone: cǎo → cáo.

sandhi.zh: "长"是上声，在非上声"莺"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：zhǎng。
sandhi.en: 长 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 莺; the written pinyin stays zhǎng.

sandhi.zh: "二"是去声，在去声"月"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：èr。
sandhi.en: 二 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 月; the written pinyin stays èr.

sandhi.zh: "柳"是上声，在非上声"醉"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：liǔ。
sandhi.en: 柳 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 醉; the written pinyin stays liǔ.

sandhi.zh: "纸"是上声，在非上声"鸢"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：zhǐ。
sandhi.en: 纸 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 鸢; the written pinyin stays zhǐ.

lines.pinyin: bì yù zhuāng chéng yī shù gāo
lines.zh: 高高的柳树仿佛是用碧玉装扮而成的。
lines.en: The tall willow seems adorned all over with jade,

lines.pinyin: wàn tiáo chuí xià lǜ sī tāo
lines.zh: 千万条柳枝垂下来，像绿色的丝带。
lines.en: its countless branches hanging like green silk ribbons.

lines.pinyin: bù zhī xì yè shuí cái chū
lines.zh: 不知道这细细的柳叶是谁裁剪出来的，
lines.en: Who, I wonder, cut out these delicate leaves?

lines.pinyin: èr yuè chūn fēng sì jiǎn dāo
lines.zh: 原来是那二月的春风，好似一把剪刀。
lines.en: It was the spring wind of the second month, like a pair of scissors.

chars.zh: 好像；多音字，又读 shì（似的）。

background.zh: 贺知章是盛唐诗人，此诗借咏柳赞美春天的勃勃生机。
background.en: By the High Tang poet He Zhizhang, praising spring's vitality through the willow.

culture.zh: “二月春风似剪刀”是咏物诗的千古名句。
culture.en: The line comparing the spring wind to scissors is among the most famous in Chinese poetry.

rhetoric.zh: 以碧玉、丝绦作比喻，末句设问作答，把无形春风化为有形剪刀。
rhetoric.en: Vivid similes and a closing question-and-answer turn the formless wind into a pair of scissors.

sandhi.zh: "咏"在上声"柳"前变读阳平（第二声）：yǒng→yóng。
sandhi.en: 咏 comes before the third-tone 柳, so it is read in second tone: yǒng → yóng.

sandhi.zh: "碧"是去声，在去声"玉"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：bì。
sandhi.en: 碧 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 玉; the written pinyin stays bì.

sandhi.zh: "一"在去声"树"前变读阳平（第二声）：yī→yí。
sandhi.en: 一 before the fourth-tone 树 changes to second tone: yī → yí.

sandhi.zh: "细"是去声，在去声"叶"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：xì。
sandhi.en: 细 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 叶; the written pinyin stays xì.

sandhi.zh: "二"是去声，在去声"月"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：èr。
sandhi.en: 二 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 月; the written pinyin stays èr.

sandhi.zh: "剪"是上声，在非上声"刀"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：jiǎn。
sandhi.en: 剪 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 刀; the written pinyin stays jiǎn.

poems.title: 晓出净慈寺送林子方
poems.titlePinyin: xiǎo chū jìng cí sì sòng lín zǐ fāng
poems.titleEn: Seeing Off Lin Zifang at Dawn from Jingci Temple
poems.author: 杨万里

lines.pinyin: bì jìng xī hú liù yuè zhōng
lines.zh: 到底是六月中旬的西湖啊，
lines.en: After all, it is West Lake in the middle of the sixth month—

lines.pinyin: fēng guāng bù yǔ sì shí tóng
lines.zh: 这里的风光与其他季节大不相同。
lines.en: its scenery is unlike that of any other season.

lines.pinyin: jiē tiān lián yè wú qióng bì
lines.zh: 莲叶一直延伸到天边，无边无际的碧绿，
lines.en: Lotus leaves reach the sky in boundless green,

lines.pinyin: yìng rì hé huā bié yàng hóng
lines.zh: 在阳光的映照下，荷花显得格外鲜红。
lines.en: and lotus blossoms, lit by the sun, are an extraordinary red.

chars.zh: 中间、中旬；多音字，又读 zhòng（中奖）。
和、同；多音字，又读 yù（参与）。
荷花；多音字，又读 hè（负荷）。

background.zh: 南宋诗人杨万里清晨在杭州净慈寺送别友人林子方时所作。
background.en: Written by the Southern Song poet Yang Wanli while seeing off his friend Lin Zifang at Hangzhou's Jingci Temple at dawn.

culture.zh: 西湖是杭州名胜，六月荷花是其代表景致。
culture.en: West Lake in Hangzhou is famed for its sixth-month lotus blossoms.

rhetoric.zh: 前两句议论，后两句写景；“接天”“映日”对仗，碧绿与鲜红色彩鲜明。
rhetoric.en: Comment then scene; parallel phrasing and the vivid green-red contrast define the lotus pond.

sandhi.zh: "晓"是上声，在非上声"出"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：xiǎo。
sandhi.en: 晓 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 出; the written pinyin stays xiǎo.

sandhi.zh: "寺"是去声，在去声"送"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：sì。
sandhi.en: 寺 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 送; the written pinyin stays sì.

sandhi.zh: "子"是上声，在非上声"方"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：zǐ。
sandhi.en: 子 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 方; the written pinyin stays zǐ.

sandhi.zh: "毕"是去声，在去声"竟"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：bì。
sandhi.en: 毕 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 竟; the written pinyin stays bì.

sandhi.zh: "六"是去声，在去声"月"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：liù。
sandhi.en: 六 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 月; the written pinyin stays liù.

sandhi.zh: "与"是上声，在非上声"四"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：yǔ。
sandhi.en: 与 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 四; the written pinyin stays yǔ.

sandhi.zh: "映"是去声，在去声"日"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：yìng。
sandhi.en: 映 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 日; the written pinyin stays yìng.

lines.pinyin: liǎng gè huáng lí míng cuì liǔ
lines.zh: 两只黄鹂在翠绿的柳树间欢快地鸣叫，
lines.en: Two golden orioles sing amid the green willows,

lines.pinyin: yī háng bái lù shàng qīng tiān
lines.zh: 一行白鹭飞上了高远的蓝天。
lines.en: a row of white egrets rises into the blue sky.

lines.pinyin: chuāng hán xī lǐng qiān qiū xuě
lines.zh: 凭窗远望，西岭上覆盖着终年不化的积雪，
lines.en: My window frames the western ridge's snow of a thousand autumns,

lines.pinyin: mén bó dōng wú wàn lǐ chuán
lines.zh: 门前停泊着来自东吴、行程万里的船只。
lines.en: at my door are moored boats from Eastern Wu, ten thousand li away.

chars.zh: 绝句：旧体诗的一种，每首四句。
黄鹂，一种叫声悦耳的鸟。
量词，一行指一排（多音字：xíng 行走）。
包含；这里指从窗口望见，如同窗框含着景物。
西边；西岭指成都西面的岷山。
千；千秋指千年、经年累月。
停船靠岸（多音字：pō 湖泊）。
东边；东吴指长江下游一带。
古地名，三国东吴，泛指江浙一带。
长度单位，这里形容遥远。

background.zh: 安史之乱平定后，杜甫回到成都草堂，心情舒畅，写下《绝句四首》，这是第三首。
background.en: After the An Lushan rebellion was quelled, Du Fu returned to his Chengdu cottage in good spirits and wrote 'Four Quatrains'; this is the third.

culture.zh: 全诗一句一景，像四幅图画；末句"万里船"暗示战乱已平、水路通航，寄托着诗人还乡的愿望。
culture.en: Each line is its own picture, like four paintings; the closing 'boats from ten-thousand li' hints the war is over and the waterways open — voicing the poet's wish to return home.

rhetoric.zh: 对仗工整（"两个"对"一行"、"黄鹂"对"白鹭"、"翠"对"青"），色彩明丽，末两句更以"千秋雪""万里船"夸张拓展时空之远，由近及远、由低到高，动静结合。
rhetoric.en: Strict parallelism (two vs a-row, oriole vs egret, green vs azure) and bright colours; the closing couplet then exaggerates with snow of a thousand autumns and boats ten-thousand li away to stretch time and space, moving near-to-far and low-to-high, blending motion and stillness.

sandhi.zh: "两"是上声，在非上声"个"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：liǎng。
sandhi.en: 两 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 个; the written pinyin stays liǎng.

sandhi.zh: "一"在阴平/阳平/上声"行"前变读去声（第四声）：yī→yì。
sandhi.en: 一 before the (1st/2nd/3rd-tone) 行 changes to fourth tone: yī → yì.

sandhi.zh: "岭"是上声，在非上声"千"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：lǐng。
sandhi.en: 岭 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 千; the written pinyin stays lǐng.

sandhi.zh: "里"是上声，在非上声"船"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：lǐ。
sandhi.en: 里 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 船; the written pinyin stays lǐ.

poems.title: 赋得古原草送别（节选）
poems.titlePinyin: fù dé gǔ yuán cǎo sòng bié (jié xuǎn)
poems.titleEn: Grass on the Ancient Plain: A Farewell (Excerpt)
poems.author: 白居易

lines.pinyin: lí lí yuán shàng cǎo
lines.zh: 原野上的青草长得茂盛繁密，
lines.en: Lush and thick, the grass upon the plain

lines.pinyin: yī suì yī kū róng
lines.zh: 每年都要经历一次枯萎和一次繁荣。
lines.en: withers and flourishes once each year.

lines.pinyin: yě huǒ shāo bù jìn
lines.zh: 野火也无法把它烧光，
lines.en: Wildfires cannot burn it away,

lines.pinyin: chūn fēng chuī yòu shēng
lines.zh: 春风一吹它又重新生长出来。
lines.en: for the spring breeze blows and it grows again.

chars.zh: 离离形容草木茂盛的样子。
完、光；多音字，又读 jǐn（尽管）。

background.zh: 相传白居易十六岁应考所作，节选自原诗前四句。
background.en: Said to have been written by Bai Juyi at sixteen; this excerpt is the poem's first four lines.

culture.zh: “野火烧不尽，春风吹又生”是赞颂顽强生命力的千古名句。
culture.en: The lines about wildfire and spring wind are a famous celebration of tenacious life force.

rhetoric.zh: 用叠词“离离”状草之盛，借小草的枯荣对比写出顽强生命力。
rhetoric.en: The reduplicated lili paints lush grass, and the withering-flourishing contrast conveys indomitable vitality.

sandhi.zh: "古"是上声，在非上声"原"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：gǔ。
sandhi.en: 古 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 原; the written pinyin stays gǔ.

sandhi.zh: "草"是上声，在非上声"送"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：cǎo。
sandhi.en: 草 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 送; the written pinyin stays cǎo.

sandhi.zh: "一"在去声"岁"前变读阳平（第二声）：yī→yí。
sandhi.en: 一 before the fourth-tone 岁 changes to second tone: yī → yí.

sandhi.zh: "一"在阴平/阳平/上声"枯"前变读去声（第四声）：yī→yì。
sandhi.en: 一 before the (1st/2nd/3rd-tone) 枯 changes to fourth tone: yī → yì.

sandhi.zh: "野"在上声"火"前变读阳平（第二声）：yě→yé。
sandhi.en: 野 comes before the third-tone 火, so it is read in second tone: yě → yé.

sandhi.zh: "火"是上声，在非上声"烧"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：huǒ。
sandhi.en: 火 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 烧; the written pinyin stays huǒ.

sandhi.zh: "不"在去声"尽"前变读阳平（第二声）：bù→bú。
sandhi.en: 不 before the fourth-tone 尽 changes to second tone: bù → bú.

lines.pinyin: chūn zhòng yī lì sù
lines.zh: 春天种下一粒谷种，
lines.en: In spring a single grain is sown,

lines.pinyin: qiū shōu wàn kē zǐ
lines.zh: 秋天就能收获成千上万颗粮食。
lines.en: and in autumn ten thousand seeds are reaped.

lines.pinyin: sì hǎi wú xián tián
lines.zh: 天下到处都没有闲置的田地，
lines.en: Within the four seas no field lies idle,

lines.pinyin: nóng fū yóu è sǐ
lines.zh: 可是种田的农民仍然会被饿死。
lines.en: yet still the farmers starve to death.

chars.zh: 种植；多音字，又读 zhǒng（种子）。

background.zh: 唐代诗人李绅《悯农》二首之一，揭露农民辛苦劳作却挨饿的社会现实。
background.en: The first of Li Shen's two 'Pity the Farmer' poems, exposing how toiling farmers still go hungry.

culture.zh: 《悯农》是中国家喻户晓的劝俭惜粮名篇。
culture.en: 'Pity the Farmer' is a household classic in China urging thrift and respect for food.

rhetoric.zh: 前两句以“一粒”对“万颗”极写丰收，后两句以丰收与饿死的强烈对比发人深省。
rhetoric.en: A 'one grain' versus 'ten thousand seeds' contrast magnifies the harvest, then the harvest-versus-starvation reversal drives the point home.

sandhi.zh: "悯"是上声，在非上声"农"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：mǐn。
sandhi.en: 悯 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 农; the written pinyin stays mǐn.

sandhi.zh: "一"在去声"粒"前变读阳平（第二声）：yī→yí。
sandhi.en: 一 before the fourth-tone 粒 changes to second tone: yī → yí.

sandhi.zh: "海"是上声，在非上声"无"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：hǎi。
sandhi.en: 海 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 无; the written pinyin stays hǎi.

poems.title: 舟夜书所见
poems.titleEn: Writing What I Saw at Night from a Boat
poems.author: 查慎行

lines.pinyin: yuè hēi jiàn yú dēng
lines.zh: 漆黑的夜里没有月光，只见到一点渔船上的灯火。
lines.en: On a moonless night I spy a fisherman's lamp,

lines.pinyin: gū guāng yī diǎn yíng
lines.zh: 那孤零零的光亮，像一只小小的萤火虫。
lines.en: a lone speck of light like a single firefly.

lines.pinyin: wēi wēi fēng cù làng
lines.zh: 微风轻轻吹起，激起阵阵细浪，
lines.en: A faint breeze gathers up the ripples,

lines.pinyin: sàn zuò mǎn hé xīng
lines.zh: 灯光随波散开，化作满河的繁星。
lines.en: and the light scatters into a river full of stars.

chars.zh: 看见；多音字，又读 xiàn（同“现”）。
散开；多音字，又读 sǎn（松散）。

background.zh: 清代诗人查慎行夜泊舟中，记下江上所见的灯影景象。
background.en: The Qing poet Zha Shenxing recorded what he saw on the river while moored in a boat at night.

culture.zh: 诗人以萤火虫和满河繁星作比，写出江上夜景的清幽美丽。
culture.en: Comparing the lamp to a firefly and to a riverful of stars captures the serene beauty of the night river.

rhetoric.zh: 由静到动，先写一点孤灯，叠词“微微”轻点风起，再写灯散成星，比喻新奇，动静相生。
rhetoric.en: Moving from stillness to motion, the single lamp is first stirred by a barely-there breeze (wēiwēi, reduplicated), then scatters into stars on the wind—a fresh, dynamic simile.

sandhi.zh: "所"是上声，在非上声"见"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：suǒ。
sandhi.en: 所 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 见; the written pinyin stays suǒ.

sandhi.zh: "一"在阴平/阳平/上声"点"前变读去声（第四声）：yī→yì。
sandhi.en: 一 before the (1st/2nd/3rd-tone) 点 changes to fourth tone: yī → yì.

sandhi.zh: "点"是上声，在非上声"萤"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：diǎn。
sandhi.en: 点 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 萤; the written pinyin stays diǎn.

sandhi.zh: "散"是去声，在去声"作"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：sàn。
sandhi.en: 散 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 作; the written pinyin stays sàn.

sandhi.zh: "满"是上声，在非上声"河"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：mǎn。
sandhi.en: 满 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 河; the written pinyin stays mǎn.
